title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Kid as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHATA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONO- Suke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, that's it. What's missing is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A dream!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are so glad that you are well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Their life after the battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It isn't me... I'm not the one they see when they look at me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They see my father... the vast shadow of the family that has supported Wano all these years...the Kozuki clan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never felt & so heavy with responsibility! Don't,back down now, Momo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I- I'd like everyone to listen to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will tell you all what happened that day, at open castle,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what my friends and I have been doing till now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, my LORD!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Momonosuke's regal figure has allayed my fears. I must away, and with haste.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is some- where I must go, and people I must meet, before the final battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see. Mm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wano Country, Kuri

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is the weight of 20 years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You cannot know how difficult it is to continue believing

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ten years was as long as they could hold out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the doldrums got to them. They headed for oniga- Shima,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Someone else I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's already been 10 years. We've aged.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you still want us to wait for people we don't even know are coming?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: believe in them! Kinemon and the others will certainly return!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: With Lord Momo- Nosuke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: because we refuse to bend the knee to Orochi,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We don't even have food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll die of illness

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: before the battle even happens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's Kaido's army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They destroyed our well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gyaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They burned our crops!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't take this anymore, gluten- warm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I remember something

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Quit Complaining! This isn't a dog's death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't gather as much men as we can under the Kozuki name, we don't stand a chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least... let us die with our swords in our hands!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're not long for this world, we want to leave as Samurai.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't stop us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: D'ya remember?

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: When we were kids...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had a chant we'd scream to test our courage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We knew that people get scared

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because they value their own lives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'd yell that we needed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to throw away our names and thoughts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Clear your mind and dive into the tray!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's hear it, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No life and no fear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come back, men!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 56 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
